prestazioni: Engine: EJ22G (2.2L turbo flat-4, 9.5:1 compression, forged internals) – Full forged rotating assembly with Manley 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings. Upgraded to a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and Tomei 3-inch titanium exhaust system with dual 3.5-inch outlets.

Fuel & Ignition: Injector Dynamics ID1000 fuel injectors paired with a Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, AEM 320LPH external lift pump, and Cobb Tuning Accessport V3 for custom ECU mapping (targeting 350whp on 93 octane). HKS 264°/264° camshafts with Tomei adjustable cam gears and NGK Iridium IX spark plugs gapped at 0.028 inches.

Drivetrain & Handling: Cusco Type-RS 1.5-way limited-slip differential, STi 6-speed manual transmission with a PPG short-throw shifter and ACT HDSS clutch kit. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (8kg/mm front, 7kg/mm rear springs), Whiteline 24mm adjustable front sway bar, and Cusco 22mm rear sway bar. Brembo GT 4-piston front calipers with 330mm slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads.
estetica: Body: Rocket Bunny V1 Legacy RS widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, carbon fiber front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap. OEM-style JDM Subaru Legacy RS rear wing (carbon fiber) and Seibon carbon fiber hood with functional vents.

Wheels & Stance: Work Meister S1 3P 17x9 +35 front and 17x10 +30 rear wheels with Toyo R888R 245/40/17 and 275/35/17 tires. Hardrace adjustable rear toe arms and Whiteline adjustable front control arms for aggressive stance and alignment correction.

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats with Schroth 4-point harnesses, Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel, and Defi BF Advance gauges (boost, oil pressure, and wideband AFR) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod. Full sound deadening with Dynamat Extreme and a Pioneer AVH-2550NEX head unit paired with a JL Audio 10TW3 subwoofer in a custom enclosure.
